name: nf-core-tools
description: Cross-agent nf-core checks and workflow guardrails powered by shared prek hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Shared nf-core checks for Codex, Claude, Cursor.
interface.longDescription: Runs deterministic nf-core checks via shared prek hook IDs (schema lint, param drift, nf-test, changelog, and module guardrails).
defaultPrompt: Run prek run --all-files and summarize failing nf-core hooks.
Run one failing hook by id and propose the smallest fix.
Check nextflow.config vs nextflow_schema.json drift and patch.
